placement_highlights.training_focus: Extensive pre-placement training including soft skills, technical workshops, and mock interviews.

general_facilities: Wi-Fi enabled campus with high-speed internet
Smart classrooms with LCD projectors and audio-video systems
Department-specific laboratories (e.g., Lathe lab, Fluid Mechanics, Thermal Engineering)
Seminar halls and conference rooms for workshops
Indoor gymnasium and outdoor sports facilities (Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Badminton)
24/7 Uninterrupted power supply with standby generator
Reverse Osmosis (RO) plant for pure drinking water
ICICI Bank ATM within the campus premises
Medical dispensary with a 24/7 doctor on call
Cafeteria and food court serving diverse refreshments

hostel_details.boys_hostel: 6 blocks adjacent to the college buildings with a capacity for 822 students
hostel_details.girls_hostel: 2 separate blocks with a capacity for 438 students, featuring 24-hour security and CCTV
hostel_details.room_types: Sharing basis (typically 3 to 6 persons per room); rooms include bed, table, chair, and wardrobe
amenities: Mess facility providing vegetarian and non-vegetarian (twice weekly) meals
Attached bathrooms available for 3rd-year students onwards
Common rooms with TV, outdoor gym, and indoor games

library_details.name: Central Library (Established 2007)
library_details.area: 11,000 sq. ft. spanning across two floors
library_details.collection: Nearly 16,000 volumes of books, 35 national/international journals, and digital library access (DELNET membership)
library_details.hours: 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM on working days; 9:30 AM to 5:00 PM on Sundays/Holidays
library_details.borrowing_limit: 4 books for both UG and PG students for a 15-day period

transport_details.fleet_size: 20 buses dedicated to the engineering college (part of a larger 100-bus fleet for RVS Group)
transport_details.coverage: Serves locations within a 70-km radius, including Coimbatore, Sulur, Tirupur, Palakkad, Palladam, Thudiyalur, and Saravanampatti
transport_details.safety: Equipped with fire extinguishers and first-aid kits
transport_details.fees: Optional service with charges ranging from approximately ₹5,000 to ₹15,000 per year

ug_programs: B.Tech. Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
pg_programs: M.E. Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)
departments: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering
